title: before-macrostep / at-stable / post-commit hook points
manager: The three macrostep-level hook points — before the macrostep, at the stable point, after commit — so host code can observe the machine at exactly the moments that matter without wrapping every transition. These are the coarse-grained observation seams for logging, metrics, and integration, defined relative to the RTC pipeline so their timing is precise, portable, and the same on every host.
cs: before-macrostep / at-stable / post-commit hook points on the RTC pipeline (W6.71); registered via the uniform registry (W6.77); timing pinned by C2.
